languages.text: Реставрированная бионическая рука высшего качества, украшенная гербом фон Валанциусов. Сделана из сочетания материалов высшего качества как человеческого, так и ксеносского происхождения. Само ее существование — техноересь в глаза Адептус Механикус.

A restored bionic arm of superior quality, emblazoned with the von Valancius crest. Made from a blend of premium materials both human and xenos in origin. Its very existence is flagrant tech-heresy in the face of the Adeptus Mechanicus.
languages.original_text: Реставрированная бионическая рука высшего качества, украшенная гербом фон Валанциусов. Сделана из сочетания материалов высшего качества как человеческого, так и ксеносского происхождения. Само ее существование — техноересь в глаза Адептус Механикус.

traits.locale_text: A restored bionic arm of superior quality, emblazoned with the von Valancius crest. Made from a blend of premium materials both human and xenos in origin. Its very existence is flagrant tech-heresy in the face of the Adeptus Mechanicus.

A restored bionic arm of superior quality, emblazoned with the von Valancius crest. Made from a blend of premium materials both human and xenos in origin. Its very existence is flagrant tech-heresy in the face of the Adeptus Mechanicus.

A restored bionic arm of superior quality, emblazoned with the von Valancius crest. Made from a blend of premium materials both human and xenos in origin. Its very existence is flagrant tech-heresy in the face of the Adeptus Mechanicus.

languages.text: フォン・ヴァランシウス家の紋章が刻まれた、高品質なバイオニックアーム。人間と異種族の最高品質素材をブレンドして作られた。その存在自体が、機械神官団の技術的異端である。
languages.original_text: A restored bionic arm of superior quality, emblazoned with the von Valancius crest. Made from a blend of premium materials both human and xenos in origin. Its very existence is flagrant tech-heresy in the face of the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: フォン・ヴァランシウス家の紋章が刻まれた、高品質なバイオニックアーム。人間と異種族の最高品質素材をブレンドして作られた。その存在自体が、機械神官団の技術的異端である。

languages.text: Von Valancius armasıyla süslenmiş, restore edilmiş, üstün kalitede bir biyonik kol. Hem insan hem de zeno kökenli birinci sınıf malzemelerin karışımından yapılmış. Varlığı bile Adeptus Mechanicus'un nezdinde apaçık tekno kâfirlik olarak nitelendiriliyor.
languages.original_text: A restored bionic arm of superior quality, emblazoned with the von Valancius crest. Made from a blend of premium materials both human and xenos in origin. Its very existence is flagrant tech-heresy in the face of the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: Von Valancius armasıyla süslenmiş, restore edilmiş, üstün kalitede bir biyonik kol. Hem insan hem de zeno kökenli birinci sınıf malzemelerin karışımından yapılmış. Varlığı bile Adeptus Mechanicus'un nezdinde apaçık tekno kâfirlik olarak nitelendiriliyor.

languages.text: Un brazo biónico restaurado de gran calidad, adornado con el emblema de los von Valancius. Está fabricado con una mezcla de materiales de primera calidad de origen humano y alienígena. Su mera existencia constituye una flagrante tecnoherejía para el Adeptus Mechanicus.
languages.original_text: A restored bionic arm of superior quality, emblazoned with the von Valancius crest. Made from a blend of premium materials both human and xenos in origin. Its very existence is flagrant tech-heresy in the face of the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: Un brazo biónico restaurado de gran calidad, adornado con el emblema de los von Valancius. Está fabricado con una mezcla de materiales de primera calidad de origen humano y alienígena. Su mera existencia constituye una flagrante tecnoherejía para el Adeptus Mechanicus.

languages.text: 一条修复后的高品质仿生手臂，饰有冯·瓦兰修斯家族的徽章。由源自人类与异形的顶级材料混合制成。在机械修会眼中，其存在本身就是公然的技术异端。
languages.original_text: A restored bionic arm of superior quality, emblazoned with the von Valancius crest. Made from a blend of premium materials both human and xenos in origin. Its very existence is flagrant tech-heresy in the face of the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: 一条修复后的高品质仿生手臂，饰有冯·瓦兰修斯家族的徽章。由源自人类与异形的顶级材料混合制成。在机械修会眼中，其存在本身就是公然的技术异端。

languages.text: Bras bionique restauré de qualité supérieure portant les armoiries des von Valancius et composé d'un mélange de matériaux de premier choix d'origine humaine ou xénos. Sa seule existence constitue aux yeux de l'Adeptus Mechanicus un flagrant délit de technohérésie.
languages.original_text: A restored bionic arm of superior quality, emblazoned with the von Valancius crest. Made from a blend of premium materials both human and xenos in origin. Its very existence is flagrant tech-heresy in the face of the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: Bras bionique restauré de qualité supérieure portant les armoiries des von Valancius et composé d'un mélange de matériaux de premier choix d'origine humaine ou xénos. Sa seule existence constitue aux yeux de l'Adeptus Mechanicus un flagrant délit de technohérésie.

languages.text: Ein restaurierter bionischer Arm von herausragender Qualität mit dem Wappen derer von Valancius. Er besteht aus Premiummaterialien, die von Menschen und Xenos genutzt werden. Seine bloße Existenz gilt in den Augen des Adeptus Mechanicus als ungeheuerliche Tech-Ketzerei.
languages.original_text: A restored bionic arm of superior quality, emblazoned with the von Valancius crest. Made from a blend of premium materials both human and xenos in origin. Its very existence is flagrant tech-heresy in the face of the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: Ein restaurierter bionischer Arm von herausragender Qualität mit dem Wappen derer von Valancius. Er besteht aus Premiummaterialien, die von Menschen und Xenos genutzt werden. Seine bloße Existenz gilt in den Augen des Adeptus Mechanicus als ungeheuerliche Tech-Ketzerei.
